queries.sphinxql: CREATE TABLE test_prepare (id bigint, title text, price float, tags multi); INSERT INTO test_prepare VALUES (1, 'hello world', 10.5, (1,2,3)), (2, 'test document', 20.0, (2,3,4)), (3, 'another test', 15.5, (3,4,5)), (4, 'prepare statement test', 25.0, (1,4,5)), (5, 'execute test', 30.0, (2,5,6));
PREPARE basic_select FROM 'SELECT * FROM test_prepare WHERE id = 1';
PREPARE select_by_id FROM 'SELECT * FROM test_prepare WHERE id = ?';
PREPARE range_select FROM 'SELECT * FROM test_prepare WHERE id >= ? AND id <= ? ORDER BY id';
PREPARE text_search FROM 'SELECT * FROM test_prepare WHERE MATCH(?)';
PREPARE price_filter FROM 'SELECT * FROM test_prepare WHERE price > ? ORDER BY price';
PREPARE insert_stmt FROM 'INSERT INTO test_prepare VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)';
PREPARE update_price FROM 'UPDATE test_prepare SET price = ? WHERE id = ?';
SELECT id, price FROM test_prepare WHERE id = 1;
PREPARE delete_stmt FROM 'DELETE FROM test_prepare WHERE id = ?';
PREPARE complex_query FROM 'SELECT id, title, price, WEIGHT() as w FROM test_prepare WHERE MATCH(?) AND price > ? ORDER BY w DESC, price ASC LIMIT ?';
PREPARE group_query FROM 'SELECT price, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM test_prepare WHERE price > ? GROUP BY price ORDER BY price';
